hero.h1: Reliable IT support for small businesses and seniors.
hero.subtitle: Honest pricing. Real accountability. No tech jargon. We handle the technology so you can focus on what you do best.

services.label: How We Can Help
services.heading: Every Service Built Around a Real Problem
services.intro: No bundled packages. No unnecessary upsells. Focused service lines — each one built around a real problem we saw going unsolved.

values.label: Why Clients Choose Us
values.heading: What Makes Kecktech Different
values.intro: There are a lot of IT companies. Here's what makes us different — and why it matters.

cards.heading: Building Toward Solar
cards.body: We're building toward a 25kW solar array and 100kWh battery bank for our Kansas facility — our 1–2 year goal. Every business decision we make today prioritizes sustainability and energy-conscious operations.

cards.heading: Accessible & Affordable
cards.body: We design our services to be affordable, jargon-free, and available to people who've been underserved by traditional IT — including seniors, small business owners, and anyone who's been told IT is too complicated for them.

cards.heading: Your Data Stays in Kansas
cards.body: We operate from Kansas and your data stays in Kansas — on our own infrastructure. We don't scan, sell, or monetize your data.

cards.heading: Real Humans. Real Accountability.
cards.body: No ticket queues. No offshore call centers. No automated runaround. When you need us, a real person picks up — the same people, every time.

cta.heading: Ready for IT That Actually Works for You?
cta.body: No long-term contracts. Transparent pricing. A team that treats every client like a neighbor.
